theme_archetype.reasoning: A dating coach for men should feel like an objective, high-end operating system (like Linear or Stripe) to build trust. We are stripping away the 'dating app' aesthetic entirely. We use the requested Indigo (#6D5EF7) sparingly as a kinetic trigger against a stark monochromatic base with generous whitespace.

hierarchy.heading_h1: font-outfit text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#09090B]
hierarchy.heading_h2: font-outfit text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#09090B]
hierarchy.small_label: font-inter text-xs font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#52525B]

typography.note: User requested Inter, but E1 principles ban Inter for headings to maintain a premium feel. We override headings with 'Outfit' for a confident, structural SaaS look, while retaining 'Inter' for body text for maximum legibility.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 to p-12 for card padding. Containers with borders must have internal padding to prevent collision.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl (16px - 24px) for cards, rounded-full for buttons

grids.landing_page: Mode A (Tetris Grid): Asymmetrical bento grid with gap-8, mixing large dominant visuals with smaller metric cards.
grids.dashboard: Mode B (Control Room): Dense layout, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or 4, gap-6. Use h-full on children to ensure stretch.

buttons.primary: bg-[#6D5EF7] hover:bg-[#5A4CE3] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-lg shadow-[#6D5EF7]/20
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-[#E4E4E7] text-[#09090B] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#FAFAFB] transition-colors

header_nav.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm

inputs.style: bg-white border border-[#E4E4E7] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#6D5EF7] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all

score_card.style: Relative container with 'Tracing Beam' inspired glowing border effect on hover. Large typography for numbers, subtle #6D5EF7 tint for high scores.

motion_and_interactions.global: Smooth Framer Motion. Use staggerChildren for list items.
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Fade in with subtle slide up (y: 10, opacity: 0 to y: 0, opacity: 1).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must lift (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow slightly. NO abrupt color changes.

key_features_design.landing_page: Hero with H1 centered, subtext, large primary button. Below fold: Asymmetric Bento Grid explaining 'How it Works', Testimonials in masonry layout.
key_features_design.onboarding_flow: Single column centered 'Typeform-style' container. Large questions, selectable high-radius cards for answers. Thin #6D5EF7 progress bar at top.
key_features_design.loading_analysis_screen: DARK PREMIUM. Background switches to #0A0A0A. Glowing #6D5EF7 loader, terminal-style sequential text ('Analyzing facial symmetry...', 'Scanning wardrobe...'). This creates perceived value for the AI.
key_features_design.ai_dashboard: Left sidebar (w-64) with Lucide icons. Main area: Top section has global score, below is Bento layout with Photo Analysis Grid (images with AI bounding boxes), Bio Review, and Style Roadmap.

image_urls.description: Confident man with glasses (Use in hero bento card or photo analysis dashboard example)
Man with crossed arms (Use as a secondary profile photo example in dashboard)
Clean white workspace (Use as background layer for testimonials or lower landing page sections, overlay with bg-white/80)

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The codebase uses JavaScript (.js/.jsx), NOT TypeScript. Do not create .tsx files.
CRITICAL: Currency must be formatted as INR (₹). E.g., ₹2,499.

Add 'Outfit' and 'Inter' to index.html from Google Fonts: <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=Outfit:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
Update tailwind.config.js to include fonts: fontFamily: { sans: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'], outfit: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif'] }
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-coaching-btn').
For the Loading/Analysis screen, completely flip the theme context to dark (#0A0A0A background) to make the AI feel 'heavy' and premium.
Use lucide-react for all icons. Avoid generic dating icons (no hearts/flames); use targets, charts, user profiles, and shields to maintain the SaaS feel.
For cards, use the shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] utility with rounded-[20px] and a 1px border of #E4E4E7/50.
